◎简　　介  

　　On 25 October, Sat.1 announced that they will produce "The Voice Kids", where 8-14 year olds will compete against each other. The judges are the german Eurovision Song Contest winner Lena Meyer-Landrut, the german singer Tim Bendzko and the german singer Henning Wehland.
